summary: HODIX backend tested via comprehensive pytest suite (34 cases across 11 endpoint groups) + frontend smoke test (login -> home -> tab navigation). Backend pass rate 97% (33/34). One CRITICAL bug found that breaks the Identite tab: GET /api/identity returns HTTP 500 due to NameError 'score' is not defined in routes_identity.py line 57 (missing 'score = await compute_trust_score(user["id"])' before the return statement). All other features verified working: auth (register/login/logout/forgot-reset with dev_token/token revocation), users, savings goals lifecycle, tontine create+join+contribute+advance-rotation, associations/cooperatives/funds, trust-score (demo=74.5 Tres Bon), insights, notifications, all 3 PDF reports (valid %PDF bytes), admin RBAC (demo blocked 403, admin allowed), audit logs. Seed data verified: 9 users, BONABERI tontine (5 members), SOLIDFEM association, Stock boutique + Scolarite goals all present. Frontend splash/onboarding/login/home dashboard render correctly with French UI and lucide icons; Identite tab is stuck on infinite loader due to the backend 500. Minor RN deprecation warnings noted (shadow* style, useNativeDriver on web, transform-origin) - not blocking.

critical.issue: HTTP 500 - NameError: name 'score' is not defined at /app/backend/routes_identity.py:57. The handler references 'score' in the return dict but never computes it. Fix: add 'score = await compute_trust_score(user["id"])' near the top of get_identity (e.g. right after db = get_db()). This breaks the Identite tab on the frontend (infinite loader) and the financial-identity feature in general.

ui_bugs.issue: Screen is stuck on infinite loader because GET /api/identity returns 500. There is no error fallback UI - the loading state never resolves. Add error handling around api.get<Identity>('/identity') to surface the failure to the user.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend awaits a response that always 500s; UI hangs forever. Will auto-resolve once the backend NameError is fixed.

issues: Multiple 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings - should migrate to boxShadow (React Native 0.76+).
Multiple Image style.resizeMode deprecation warnings - should use props.resizeMode.
Animated.useNativeDriver=true used in JS animations but unsupported on web - falls back to JS animator with warnings (cosmetic only).
Invalid DOM property transform-origin (use transformOrigin) - cosmetic React warning.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: /app/backend/routes_identity.py get_identity() - add 'score = await compute_trust_score(user["id"])' before the return statement (around line 49). Without this, /api/identity 500s and the Identite tab is unusable.
Add error UI / fallback state in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/identity.tsx so a backend failure no longer freezes the screen on the spinner.
Optional: migrate shadow* styles to boxShadow and Image style.resizeMode to props.resizeMode to silence Expo deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_identity.py:57 references undefined variable 'score' - clear missing line bug.
Code is clean and modular; all routes use {"_id": 0} projection - good MongoDB hygiene.
Passwords correctly bcrypt-hashed via passlib; JWT revocation via token-id blacklist works.
All endpoints use proper Pydantic models and async/await.
GET /api/notifications returns {items, unread_count} (object) - the frontend already consumes it that way, so this is fine; just worth noting it is not a bare list.

success_rate.frontend: Splash/onboarding/login/home OK; Identite tab broken due to backend 500. Not all tabs deep-tested due to scope.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing seed (demo@hodix.app, admin@hodix.app). Created some TEST_ prefixed users and a TEST_fund/TEST_goal/TEST_tontine during testing - these are leftover but identifiable by TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_hodix_api.py after the get_identity fix; expect 34/34. Then exercise the Identite tab on the frontend mobile viewport (390x844) to verify the certificate card, trust gauge bars and 3 PDF buttons render. Also test deep flows not yet exercised: Epargne -> /savings/create flow with each savings_type (flexible/locked/recurring), Groupes sub-tabs (Tontines/Associations/Cooperatives/Fonds) including 'Rejoindre via code', Profil edit toggle, and admin panel UI (login as admin@hodix.app / Admin123!).
rca_of_issue: Root cause: /app/backend/routes_identity.py get_identity handler builds a response dict containing 'trust_score: score' (line 57) but never assigns the local variable 'score'. The author intended to call compute_trust_score (as report_identity/report_trust do) but the line was omitted. Reproduction: 1) Login demo@hodix.app / Demo123!. 2) curl /api/identity with Bearer token -> 500. 3) backend logs show: NameError: name 'score' is not defined. Mitigation: add 'score = await compute_trust_score(user["id"])' (or 'await store_trust_score' to persist) right after 'db = get_db()' inside get_identity. After fix, /api/identity must return {user, trust_score, totals, currency} with score.score > 0 for the demo user and the Identite tab will render.
